package rulecoverage

func NegativeAwsCredentialHardcoded() string {
    ruleID := "aws_credential_hardcoded"
    family := "library"
    severity := "error"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`credentials.NewStaticCredentials(\"AKID...\", \"secret...\", \"\")` with literal access keys"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
